---
title: "Rethinking how we measure affect: new insights into psychological well-being"
date: 2025-02-05
description: "Our study in the journal Emotion reveals that well-being is best measured by affect transitions rather than emotion intensity."
categories: [Publications, Research]
---

*Content to be migrated from [pandelisperakakis.info](https://pandelisperakakis.info/2025/02/05/rethinking-how-we-measure-affect-new-insights-into-psychological-well-being/).*

<!-- Paste the full post content here -->
